tEn: Fast High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Adversarial Diffusion Distillation
tZh: 潜在对抗扩散蒸馏实现快速高分辨率图像合成
sEn: LADD uses generative features from pretrained latent diffusion models to enable fast, high-resolution image synthesis with only four sampling steps.
sZh: LADD利用预训练潜在扩散模型的生成特征，仅需四步采样即可实现快速高分辨率图像合成。
absEn: Diffusion models are the main driver of progress in image and video synthesis, but suffer from slow inference speed. Distillation methods, like the recently introduced adversarial diffusion distillation (ADD) aim to shift the model from many-shot to single-step inference, albeit at the cost of expensive and difficult optimization due to its reliance on a fixed pretrained DINOv2 discriminator. We introduce Latent Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (LADD), a novel distillation approach overcoming the limitations of ADD. In contrast to pixel-based ADD, LADD utilizes generative features from pretrained latent diffusion models. This approach simplifies training and enhances performance, enabling high-resolution multi-aspect ratio image synthesis. We apply LADD to Stable Diffusion 3 (8B) to obtain SD3-Turbo, a fast model that matches the performance of state-of-the-art text-to-image generators using only four unguided sampling steps. Moreover, we systematically investigate its scaling behavior and demonstrate LADD's effectiveness in various applications such as image editing and inpainting.
absZh: 扩散模型是图像和视频合成进步的主要驱动力，但推理速度慢。蒸馏方法，如最近引入的对抗扩散蒸馏（ADD），旨在将模型从多步推理转变为单步推理，但因其依赖固定的预训练DINOv2判别器而导致优化昂贵且困难。我们提出了潜在对抗扩散蒸馏（LADD），一种克服ADD局限性的新型蒸馏方法。与基于像素的ADD不同，LADD利用预训练潜在扩散模型的生成特征。这种方法简化了训练并提升了性能，实现了高分辨率多宽高比图像合成。我们将LADD应用于Stable Diffusion 3（8B）以获得SD3-Turbo，一个仅需四步无引导采样即可匹配最先进文本到图像生成器性能的快速模型。此外，我们系统研究了其缩放行为，并展示了LADD在图像编辑和修复等多种应用中的有效性。

contrib.en: Introduces Latent Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (LADD), a novel distillation method using generative features from pretrained latent diffusion models.
contrib.zh: 提出潜在对抗扩散蒸馏（LADD），一种利用预训练潜在扩散模型生成特征的新型蒸馏方法。

contrib.en: Applies LADD to Stable Diffusion 3 (8B) to obtain SD3-Turbo, achieving state-of-the-art performance in four unguided sampling steps.
contrib.zh: 将LADD应用于Stable Diffusion 3（8B）得到SD3-Turbo，在四步无引导采样中达到最先进性能。

contrib.en: Systematically investigates scaling behavior of LADD, showing student model size as the most impactful factor.
contrib.zh: 系统研究LADD的缩放行为，表明学生模型大小是最具影响力的因素。

contrib.en: Demonstrates LADD's versatility in image editing and inpainting tasks with single-step inference.
contrib.zh: 展示LADD在图像编辑和修复任务中的多功能性，实现单步推理。

contrib.en: Simplifies training by unifying teacher and discriminator in latent space, eliminating decoding to pixel space.
contrib.zh: 通过在潜在空间中统一教师和判别器简化训练，消除解码到像素空间的需求。

contrib.en: Achieves multi-aspect ratio high-resolution image synthesis with stable adversarial training.
contrib.zh: 实现多宽高比高分辨率图像合成，训练稳定。

limits.en: SD3-Turbo shows reduced prompt alignment compared to teacher SD3, causing object duplication and spatial prompting issues.
limits.zh: SD3-Turbo相比教师SD3提示对齐降低，导致对象重复和空间提示问题。

limits.en: Image editing lacks control over image and text guidance strengths, limiting flexibility.
limits.zh: 图像编辑缺乏对图像和文本引导强度的控制，限制了灵活性。

limits.en: Model exhibits rigidity in editing, adhering too closely to input and making large changes challenging.
limits.zh: 模型在编辑中表现出刚性，过于贴近输入，难以进行大改动。

limits.en: Scaling benefits plateau for teacher model and data quality beyond certain thresholds.
limits.zh: 教师模型和数据质量的缩放收益在超过一定阈值后趋于平稳。

limits.en: Adversarial training may still require careful tuning of noise distribution parameters.
limits.zh: 对抗训练仍需仔细调整噪声分布参数。

items.en: Diffusion models are the main driver of progress in image and video synthesis, but suffer from slow inference speed. Distillation methods, like the recently introduced adversarial diffusion distillation (ADD) aim to shift the model from many-shot to single-step inference, albeit at the cost of expensive and difficult optimization due to its reliance on a fixed pretrained DINOv2 discriminator. We introduce Latent Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (LADD), a novel distillation approach overcoming the limitations of ADD. In contrast to pixel-based ADD, LADD utilizes generative features from pretrained latent diffusion models. This approach simplifies training and enhances performance, enabling high-resolution multi-aspect ratio image synthesis. We apply LADD to Stable Diffusion 3 (8B) to obtain SD3-Turbo, a fast model that matches the performance of state-of-the-art text-to-image generators using only four unguided sampling steps. Moreover, we systematically investigate its scaling behavior and demonstrate LADD’s effectiveness in various applications such as image editing and inpainting.
items.zh: 扩散模型是图像和视频合成进展的主要驱动力，但推理速度较慢。蒸馏方法，如最近引入的对抗性扩散蒸馏（ADD），旨在将模型从多步推理转变为单步推理，但代价是依赖固定的预训练DINOv2判别器，导致优化昂贵且困难。我们引入了潜在对抗性扩散蒸馏（LADD），一种克服ADD局限性的新型蒸馏方法。与基于像素的ADD不同，LADD利用预训练潜在扩散模型的生成特征。这种方法简化了训练并提升了性能，实现了高分辨率多宽高比图像合成。我们将LADD应用于Stable Diffusion 3（8B），得到SD3-Turbo，一个仅使用四步无引导采样即可匹配最先进文本到图像生成器性能的快速模型。此外，我们系统研究了其缩放行为，并展示了LADD在图像编辑和修复等多种应用中的有效性。

items.capZh: 图1：使用SD3-Turbo生成高分辨率多宽高比图像。所有样本均使用最多四次Transformer评估生成，训练采用潜在对抗性扩散蒸馏（LADD）。

items.en: While diffusion models [54, 18, 57, 30, 31] have revolutionized both synthesis and editing of images [10, 42, 41, 1, 43, 13, 9, 38] and videos [5, 4, 53, 2, 12, 19], their iterative nature remains a crucial shortcoming: At inference, a trained diffusion model usually requires dozens of network evaluations to approximate the probability path from noise to data. This makes sampling slow, in particular for large models, and limits real-time applications.
items.zh: 尽管扩散模型[54, 18, 57, 30, 31]彻底改变了图像和视频的合成与编辑[10, 42, 41, 1, 43, 13, 9, 38]，但其迭代特性仍然是一个关键缺陷：在推理时，训练好的扩散模型通常需要数十次网络评估来近似从噪声到数据的概率路径。这使得采样速度变慢，尤其对于大型模型，并限制了实时应用。

items.en: Naturally, a large body of work focuses on speeding up the sampling of diffusion models — both via improved samplers [55, 11, 66, 51] and distilled models that are trained to match the sample quality of their teacher models in fewer steps [44, 35, 34, 58]. Very recent distillation works aim at reducing the number of model evaluations to a single step, enabling real-time synthesis [63, 34, 62, 49, 28]. The best results in the one- and few-step regime are currently achieved with methods that leverage adversarial training [50, 62, 49, 28], forcing the output distribution towards the real image manifold. Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD) [49] provides the current state-of-the-art method for single-step synthesis: By leveraging a pretrained DINOv2 [36] feature extractor as the backbone of the discriminator, ADD manages to distill SDXL [38] into a single-step, real-time text-to-image model.
items.zh: 自然，大量工作专注于加速扩散模型的采样——既通过改进的采样器[55, 11, 66, 51]，也通过蒸馏模型，这些模型被训练为在更少步骤中匹配教师模型的样本质量[44, 35, 34, 58]。最近的蒸馏工作旨在将模型评估次数减少到单步，实现实时合成[63, 34, 62, 49, 28]。在单步和少步领域，目前最佳结果是通过利用对抗训练的方法[50, 62, 49, 28]实现的，迫使输出分布接近真实图像流形。对抗性扩散蒸馏（ADD）[49]提供了当前最先进的单步合成方法：通过利用预训练的DINOv2 [36]特征提取器作为判别器的骨干，ADD成功将SDXL [38]蒸馏为单步、实时的文本到图像模型。

items.en: However, while achieving impressive inference speed, ADD comes with a series of shortcomings: First, the usage of the fixed and pretrained DINOv2 network restricts the discriminator’s training resolution to 518×518518518518\times 518 pixels. Furthermore, there is no straightforward way to control the feedback level of the discriminator, e.g., for weighting global shape vs. local features differently. Finally, for distilling latent diffusion models, ADD needs to decode to RGB space, as the discriminator has not been trained in latent space, which significantly hinders high-resolution training >5122absentsuperscript5122>512^{2} pixels.
items.zh: 然而，尽管实现了令人印象深刻的推理速度，ADD也存在一系列缺点：首先，使用固定的预训练DINOv2网络限制了判别器的训练分辨率为518×518像素。此外，没有直接的方法来控制判别器的反馈水平，例如，对全局形状和局部特征赋予不同权重。最后，对于蒸馏潜在扩散模型，ADD需要解码到RGB空间，因为判别器未在潜在空间训练，这严重阻碍了高分辨率训练（>512²像素）。

items.en: More generally, and in contrast to large language models [25, 20] and diffusion models [37, 13], current adversarial models do not strictly adhere to scaling laws, and stable training methods usually require extensive hyperparameter tuning. In fact, previous attempts at scaling GANs resulted in diminishing returns when scaling the generator [48, 24]. Even more surprisingly, smaller discriminator feature networks often offer better performance than their larger counterparts [49, 48]. These non-intuitive properties are a significant shortcoming for GAN practitioners: Models that follow scaling laws offer predictable improvements in performance, allowing for more strategic and cost-effective scaling, and ultimately better model development.
items.zh: 更一般地，与大型语言模型[25, 20]和扩散模型[37, 13]不同，当前的对抗模型并不严格遵循缩放定律，稳定的训练方法通常需要大量的超参数调优。事实上，之前扩展GAN的尝试导致生成器扩展时收益递减[48, 24]。更令人惊讶的是，较小的判别器特征网络通常比更大的对应网络提供更好的性能[49, 48]。这些非直观的特性是GAN从业者的重大缺点：遵循缩放定律的模型提供可预测的性能提升，允许更具战略性和成本效益的扩展，并最终实现更好的模型开发。

items.en: In this work, we present Latent Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (LADD), an approach that offers stable, scalable adversarial distillation of pretrained diffusion transformer models [37, 13] up to the megapixel regime: Instead of utilizing discriminative features of, e.g., self-supervised feature networks such as DINOv2, we leverage generative features of a pretrained diffusion model. While directly enabling multi-aspect training, this approach also offers a natural way to control the discriminator features: By targeted sampling of the noise levels during training, we can bias the discriminator features towards more global (high noise level) or local (low noise level) behavior. Furthermore, distillation in latent space allows for leveraging large student and teacher networks and avoids the expensive decoding step to pixel space, enabling high-resolution image synthesis. Consequently, LADD results in a significantly simpler training setup than ADD while outperforming all prior single-step approaches.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了潜在对抗性扩散蒸馏（LADD），一种能够稳定、可扩展地将预训练扩散Transformer模型[37, 13]蒸馏到百万像素级别的方法：我们不使用自监督特征网络（如DINOv2）的判别特征，而是利用预训练扩散模型的生成特征。这种方法直接支持多宽高比训练，同时提供了一种自然的方式来控制判别器特征：通过在训练过程中有针对性地采样噪声水平，我们可以使判别器特征偏向更全局（高噪声水平）或更局部（低噪声水平）的行为。此外，在潜在空间中进行蒸馏允许利用大型学生和教师网络，并避免了昂贵的解码到像素空间的步骤，从而实现了高分辨率图像合成。因此，LADD的训练设置比ADD简单得多，同时优于所有先前的单步方法。

items.en: We apply LADD to the current state-of-the-art text-to-image model Stable Diffusion 3 [13] and obtain SD3-Turbo, a multi-aspect megapixel generator that matches its teacher’s image quality in only four sampling steps. In summary, the core contributions of our work are
items.zh: 我们将LADD应用于当前最先进的文本到图像模型Stable Diffusion 3 [13]，得到SD3-Turbo，一个多宽高比百万像素生成器，仅需四步采样即可匹配其教师模型的图像质量。总之，我们工作的核心贡献是：

items.en: a demonstration of the versatility of our approach via two exemplary applications: image editing and image inpainting.
items.zh: 通过两个示例应用（图像编辑和图像修复）展示了我们方法的多样性。

items.en: We will make code and model weights publicly available.
items.zh: 我们将公开代码和模型权重。

items.en: While the denoiser D𝐷D learns to predict clean images with sharp high frequency details for sufficiently small t𝑡t, it also learns to approximate the mean of the empirical data distribution for large t𝑡t, resulting in a highly non-linear differential equation. Therefore, one needs to solve the differential equations with sufficiently small step sizes, resulting in many (expensive) evaluations of the network Fθsubscript𝐹𝜃F_{\theta}.
items.zh: 虽然去噪器D学习在足够小的t下预测具有清晰高频细节的干净图像，但它也学习在大的t下近似经验数据分布的均值，导致高度非线性的微分方程。因此，需要以足够小的步长求解微分方程，导致对网络F_θ进行多次（昂贵的）评估。

items.en: For many applications, such as text-to-image generation, we are, however, only interested in the final (clean image) distribution at t=0𝑡0t{=}0 which can be obtained from a multitude of different differential equations. In particular, many distillation techniques attempt to learn “simpler” differential equations that result in the same distribution at t=0𝑡0t{=}0 however with “straighter”, more linear, trajectories (which allows for larger step sizes and therefore less evaluations of the network Fθsubscript𝐹𝜃F_{\theta}). Progressive Distillation [44], for example, tries to distill two Euler steps into a single Euler step. This technique iteratively halves the number of steps required, however, it suffers from error accumulation as generally five or more rounds of distillation are needed to obtain a fast model. Reflow [31] is another distillation technique where new models are trained iteratively on synthetic data from older models, and therefore also suffers from error accumulation. In contrast, Consistency Distillation [58] distills models in a single stage without iterative application, however, the training process is quite unstable and requires advanced techniques such as distillation schedules [58], and extensive hyperparameter tuning. Improved techniques for both Consistency Distillation [56, 33, 15, 68] and Progressive Distillation [35, 28, 3] have since been introduced. The current top-performing distillation methods for text-to-image applications utilize adversarial training. In particular, Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD) [49], uses a pretrained feature extractors as its discriminator, achieving performance on par with strong diffusion models such as SDXL [38] in only four steps.
items.zh: 然而，对于许多应用，如文本到图像生成，我们只关心t=0时的最终（干净图像）分布，这可以通过多种不同的微分方程获得。特别是，许多蒸馏技术试图学习“更简单”的微分方程，这些方程在t=0时产生相同的分布，但具有“更直”、更线性的轨迹（这允许更大的步长，从而减少对网络F_θ的评估次数）。例如，渐进式蒸馏[44]试图将两个欧拉步骤蒸馏为一个欧拉步骤。该技术迭代地将所需步数减半，但由于通常需要五轮或更多轮蒸馏才能获得快速模型，因此存在误差累积。Reflow [31]是另一种蒸馏技术，其中新模型在旧模型的合成数据上迭代训练，因此也存在误差累积。相比之下，一致性蒸馏[58]在单阶段中蒸馏模型，无需迭代应用，但训练过程相当不稳定，需要先进技术如蒸馏调度[58]和广泛的超参数调优。此后，改进的一致性蒸馏[56, 33, 15, 68]和渐进式蒸馏[35, 28, 3]技术已被引入。目前，文本到图像应用中性能最佳的蒸馏方法利用对抗训练。特别是，对抗性扩散蒸馏（ADD）[49]使用预训练的特征提取器作为其判别器，在仅四步中实现了与强扩散模型（如SDXL [38]）相当的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparing ADD and LADD. System overview and direct comparison to ADD. ADD (top two rows) computes a distillation loss in pixel space and an adversarial loss on top of DINOv2 features, thereby requiring expensive decoding from latent space to pixel space. In LADD (bottom row), we use the teacher model for synthetic data generation and its features for the adversarial loss, which allows us to train purely in the latent space.
items.capZh: 图3：比较ADD和LADD。系统概览及与ADD的直接比较。ADD（上两行）在像素空间中计算蒸馏损失，并在DINOv2特征之上计算对抗损失，因此需要从潜在空间解码到像素空间。在LADD（下一行）中，我们使用教师模型进行合成数据生成，并使用其特征进行对抗损失，这使我们能够完全在潜在空间中进行训练。

items.en: By leveraging a lower-dimensional latent space, latent diffusion models (LDMs) [42] significantly reduce memory requirements for training, facilitating the efficient scaling of to large model size and high resolutions. This advantage is exemplified by the recently introduced MMDiT family [13] of LDMs where the largest model (8B parameters) achieves state-of-the art text-to-image synthesis performance. Our goal is to distill such large LDMs efficiently for high-resolution, multi-aspect image synthesis. Latent adversarial diffusion distillation (LADD), simplifies the distillation process by eliminating the necessity of decoding back to the image space, thereby significantly reducing memory demands in comparison to its predecessor, ADD.
items.zh: 通过利用低维潜在空间，潜在扩散模型（LDM）[42]显著降低了训练的内存需求，促进了向大模型大小和高分辨率的高效扩展。这一优势在最近引入的MMDiT系列[13] LDM中得到了体现，其中最大的模型（8B参数）实现了最先进的文本到图像合成性能。我们的目标是高效蒸馏这样的大型LDM，用于高分辨率、多宽高比图像合成。潜在对抗性扩散蒸馏（LADD）通过消除解码回图像空间的必要性简化了蒸馏过程，从而与其前身ADD相比显著降低了内存需求。

items.en: Distillation in latent space. An overview of LADD and comparison to ADD is shown in Fig. 3. In ADD, the ADD-student receives noised input images xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} at the timestep t𝑡t and generates samples x^θ​(xt,t)subscript^𝑥𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\hat{x}_{\theta}(x_{t},t) aiming to optimize for two objectives: an adversarial loss La​d​vsubscript𝐿𝑎𝑑𝑣L_{adv}, which involves deceiving a discriminator, and a distillation loss Ld​i​s​t​i​l​lsubscript𝐿𝑑𝑖𝑠𝑡𝑖𝑙𝑙L_{distill}, which involves matching the denoised output to that of a frozen DM teacher. LADD introduces two main modifications: the unification of discriminator and teacher model, and the adoption of synthetic data for training.
items.zh: 潜在空间中的蒸馏。LADD的概览及与ADD的比较如图3所示。在ADD中，ADD学生接收在时间步t加噪的输入图像x_t，并生成样本x̂_θ(x_t, t)，旨在优化两个目标：对抗损失L_adv（涉及欺骗判别器）和蒸馏损失L_distill（涉及将去噪输出与冻结的DM教师匹配）。LADD引入了两个主要修改：统一判别器和教师模型，以及采用合成数据进行训练。

items.en: Unifying teacher and discriminator. Instead of decoding and applying a discriminator in image space, we operate exclusively on latents. First, we renoise the generated latents at timestep t^^𝑡\hat{t} drawn from a logit-normal distribution, following [13]. We then apply the teacher model to the noised latents, extracting the full token sequence after each attention block. On each token sequence, we apply independent discriminator heads. Additionally, each discriminator is conditioned on the noise level and pooled CLIP embeddings.
items.zh: 统一教师与判别器。我们不在图像空间中进行解码和应用判别器，而是仅在潜变量上操作。首先，我们按照[13]的方法，从logit-正态分布中抽取时间步t̂对生成的潜变量进行重新加噪。然后，我们将教师模型应用于加噪后的潜变量，在每个注意力块后提取完整的令牌序列。在每个令牌序列上，我们应用独立的判别器头。此外，每个判别器都以噪声水平和池化的CLIP嵌入为条件。

items.en: ADD leverages the Projected GAN paradigm [46], i.e., applying independent discriminators on features obtained from pretrained features network. We can distinguish these feature networks depending on the pretraining task which is either discriminative (classification, self-supervised objective) or generative (diffusion objective). Utilizing generative features presents several key benefits over discriminative ones:
items.zh: ADD采用了投影GAN范式[46]，即在从预训练特征网络获得的特征上应用独立的判别器。我们可以根据预训练任务是判别性（分类、自监督目标）还是生成性（扩散目标）来区分这些特征网络。利用生成性特征相比判别性特征具有几个关键优势：

items.en: Efficiency and Simplification. Generative features eliminate the need for decoding to image space, thereby saving memory and simplifying the overall system compared to ADD. Another possible option is training a discriminative feature network in latent space, yet, discriminative pretraining is non-trivial and top-performing approaches require significant engineering [8, 36].
items.zh: 效率与简化。生成性特征消除了解码到图像空间的需要，从而节省内存并简化了整体系统，相比ADD更为简单。另一种可能的选项是在潜空间中训练判别性特征网络，然而，判别性预训练并非易事，且性能最佳的方法需要大量的工程工作[8, 36]。

items.en: Noise-level specific feedback. Generative features vary with noise level, providing structured feedback at high noise levels and texture-related feedback at low noise levels [1, 32]. By adjusting the parameters of the noise sampling distribution, we gain direct control over discriminator behavior, aligning with the standard practice of loss weighting in diffusion model training [26, 13]
items.zh: 噪声级别特定的反馈。生成性特征随噪声级别变化，在高噪声级别提供结构化反馈，在低噪声级别提供纹理相关反馈[1, 32]。通过调整噪声采样分布的参数，我们可以直接控制判别器的行为，这与扩散模型训练中损失加权的标准实践相一致[26, 13]。

items.en: Multi-Aspect Ratio (MAR). Since the teacher model is trained on MAR data, it inherently generates relevant features for the discriminators in in this setting.
items.zh: 多宽高比（MAR）。由于教师模型在MAR数据上训练，它在此设置中为判别器固有地生成相关特征。

items.en: Alignment with Human Perception. Discriminative models exhibit a notable texture bias [14], prioritizing texture over global shape, unlike humans who tend to rely on global shape. Jaini et al. [22] demonstrates that generative models possess a shape bias closely resembling that of humans and achieve near human-level accuracy on out-of-distribution tasks. This suggests that leveraging pretrained generative features for adversarial training could enhance alignment with human perception.
items.zh: 与人类感知的对齐。判别性模型表现出显著的纹理偏差[14]，优先考虑纹理而非全局形状，而人类则倾向于依赖全局形状。Jaini等人[22]证明生成性模型具有与人类非常相似的形状偏差，并在分布外任务上达到接近人类水平的准确率。这表明利用预训练生成性特征进行对抗训练可以增强与人类感知的对齐。

items.en: For the discriminator architecture, we mostly follow [48, 49]. However, instead of utilizing 1D convolution in the discriminator, we reshape the token sequence back to its original spatial layout, and transition to 2D convolutions. Switching from 1D to 2D convolutions circumvents a potential issue in the MAR setting, where a 1D discriminator would process token sequences of varying strides for different aspect ratios, potentially compromising its efficacy.
items.zh: 对于判别器架构，我们主要遵循[48, 49]。然而，我们没有在判别器中使用1D卷积，而是将令牌序列重塑回其原始空间布局，并过渡到2D卷积。从1D卷积切换到2D卷积避免了MAR设置中的一个潜在问题，即1D判别器会处理不同宽高比下步长变化的令牌序列，可能损害其有效性。

items.en: Leveraging synthetic data. Classifier-free guidance (CFG) [17] is essential for generating high-quality samples. However, in one-shot scenarios, CFG simply oversaturates samples rather than improving text-alignment [48]. This observation suggests that CFG works best in settings with multiple steps, allowing for corrections of oversaturation issues ins most cases. Additional techniques like dynamic thresholding further ameliorate this issue [43].
items.zh: 利用合成数据。无分类器引导（CFG）[17]对于生成高质量样本至关重要。然而，在单步场景中，CFG只会使样本过度饱和，而不是改善文本对齐[48]。这一观察表明，CFG在具有多个步骤的设置中效果最佳，允许在大多数情况下纠正过度饱和问题。额外的技术如动态阈值进一步改善了这个问题[43]。

items.en: Text-alignment varies significantly across natural datasets. For instance, while COCO [29] images reach an average CLIP 111We compute CLIP score using the ViT-g-14 model available at https://github.com/mlfoundations/open˙clip score [39] of 0.29, top-performing diffusion models can achieve notably higher CLIP scores, e.g. SD3 attains a CLIP score of 0.35 on COCO prompts. CLIP score is an imperfect metric, yet, the large score differential between natural and synthetic data suggests that generated images are better aligned for a given prompt on average. To mitigate this issue and avoid additional complexity that is introduced by an auxiliary distillation loss as in ADD, we opt for synthetic data generation via the teacher model at a constant CFG value. This strategy ensures high and relatively uniform image-text aligned data and can be considered as an alternative approach for distilling the teacher’s knowledge.
items.zh: 文本对齐在不同自然数据集之间差异显著。例如，虽然COCO[29]图像的平均CLIP分数（我们使用https://github.com/mlfoundations/open_clip提供的ViT-g-14模型计算CLIP分数[39]）为0.29，但性能最佳的扩散模型可以达到明显更高的CLIP分数，例如SD3在COCO提示上达到0.35的CLIP分数。CLIP分数是一个不完美的指标，然而，自然数据和合成数据之间的大分数差异表明，生成的图像平均而言对于给定提示的对齐更好。为了缓解这个问题并避免像ADD中那样引入辅助蒸馏损失带来的额外复杂性，我们选择通过教师模型以恒定的CFG值生成合成数据。这种策略确保了高且相对均匀的图像-文本对齐数据，可以被视为蒸馏教师知识的替代方法。

items.en: As LADD eliminates the need for decoding, we can directly generate latents with the teacher model and omit the additional encoding step for real data. For conditioning of the teacher, we sample prompts from the original training dataset of SD3.
items.zh: 由于LADD消除了解码的需要，我们可以直接用教师模型生成潜变量，并省略真实数据的额外编码步骤。对于教师模型的条件，我们从SD3的原始训练数据集中采样提示。

items.en: In this section, we evaluate our approach in the single-step setting, i.e., starting from pure noise inputs. For evaluation, we compute the CLIP score on all prompts from DrawBench [43] and PartiPrompts [64]. We train for 10k iterations and the default model for the student, teacher, and data generator is an MMDiT with a depth of 24 (∼similar-to\sim2B parameters) if not explicitly stated otherwise. Accordingly, the qualitative outputs in this section are generally of lower quality than the ones of our final (larger) model.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们评估了单步设置下的方法，即从纯噪声输入开始。为了评估，我们计算了DrawBench[43]和PartiPrompts[64]上所有提示的CLIP分数。我们训练了10k次迭代，除非另有明确说明，学生、教师和数据生成器的默认模型是深度为24（约2B参数）的MMDiT。因此，本节中的定性输出通常比我们最终（更大）模型的输出质量低。

items.en: Fig. 4 illustrates the effect of different parametrization for the logit-normal distributions π​(t;m,s)𝜋𝑡𝑚𝑠\pi(t;m,s) of the teacher. When biasing the distribution towards low noise values, we observe missing global coherence while textures and local patches look realistic. Lacking global coherence is a common problem in adversarial training and additional losses such as classifier or CLIP guidance are often introduced to improve image quality [47, 48]. While increasing the bias towards higher noise levels improves coherence, excessively high noise levels can detrimentally affect texture and fine details. We find π(t;m=1,s=1)\pi(t;m=1,s=1) to be solid choice which we will use for the remainder of this work.
items.zh: 图4展示了教师模型logit-正态分布π(t;m,s)不同参数化的效果。当分布偏向低噪声值时，我们观察到全局连贯性缺失，而纹理和局部块看起来逼真。缺乏全局连贯性是对抗训练中的常见问题，通常引入分类器或CLIP引导等额外损失来改善图像质量[47, 48]。虽然增加对更高噪声级别的偏向改善了连贯性，但过高的噪声级别可能对纹理和细节产生不利影响。我们发现π(t;m=1,s=1)是一个可靠的选择，将在本文的其余部分使用。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Controlling the teacher noise distribution. We vary the parameters of a logit-normal distribution for biasing the sampling of the teacher noise level. Shifting to higher noise improves overall coherence. When biasing towards very high noise levels (m=2,s=2formulae-sequence𝑚2𝑠2m=2,s=2), we observe a loss of fine details.
items.capZh: 图4：控制教师噪声分布。我们改变logit-正态分布的参数以偏向教师噪声级别的采样。向更高噪声偏移改善了整体连贯性。当偏向非常高噪声级别（m=2,s=2）时，我们观察到细节的丢失。

items.en: We aim to answer two questions: Does synthetic data lead to improvements in image-text alignment over real data? And, is an additional distillation loss Ld​i​s​t​i​l​lsubscript𝐿𝑑𝑖𝑠𝑡𝑖𝑙𝑙L_{distill} necessary? Fig. 5 displays the findings. Training with synthetic data significantly outperforms training with real data. While a distillation loss benefits training with real data, it offers no advantage for synthetic data. Thus, training on synthetic data can be effectively conducted using only an adversarial loss.
items.zh: 我们旨在回答两个问题：合成数据是否比真实数据在图像-文本对齐方面带来改进？以及额外的蒸馏损失L_distill是否必要？图5展示了发现。使用合成数据训练显著优于使用真实数据训练。虽然蒸馏损失有利于使用真实数据训练，但对合成数据没有优势。因此，仅使用对抗损失即可有效进行合成数据训练。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Synthetic data improves image-text alignment. We compare outputs for a fixed seed and the prompts “panda scientist mixing chemicals" and “a red car on a scenic road above a cliff." When training on real data, an additional distillation Ld​i​s​t​i​l​lsubscript𝐿𝑑𝑖𝑠𝑡𝑖𝑙𝑙L_{distill} improves details and thereby increases image-text alignment. Training on synthetic data substantially outperforms training on real data rendering the distillation loss obsolete.
items.capZh: 图5：合成数据改善图像-文本对齐。我们比较了固定种子和提示“熊猫科学家混合化学品”以及“悬崖上风景道路上的红色汽车”的输出。当在真实数据上训练时，额外的蒸馏L_distill改善了细节，从而提高了图像-文本对齐。在合成数据上训练显著优于在真实数据上训练，使蒸馏损失变得多余。

items.en: Consistency Distillation [58] is another recent and popular approach for distillation. Latent consistency models (LCM) [33, 34] leverage consistency distillation for LDMs where training is conducted exclusively in latent space, similarly to LADD. For a fair comparison, we train the same student model with LCM and LADD. We observe much higher volatility for LCM than for LADD training, i.e., outcomes vastly differ for small changes in hyperparameters, different random seeds, and training iterations. For LCM, we run a hyperparameter grid search over the skipping-step [33], noise schedule, and full-finetuning (with and without EMA target [56]) vs LoRA-training [34] and select the best checkpoint out of all runs and over the course of training. For LADD, we train only once and select the last checkpoint. As Fig. 6 shows, LADD outperforms LCM by a large margin.
items.zh: 一致性蒸馏[58]是另一种最近流行的蒸馏方法。潜一致性模型（LCM）[33, 34]利用一致性蒸馏用于LDM，训练完全在潜空间中进行，类似于LADD。为了公平比较，我们用LCM和LADD训练了相同的学生模型。我们观察到LCM训练比LADD训练波动性大得多，即超参数微小变化、不同随机种子和训练迭代会导致结果差异巨大。对于LCM，我们对跳跃步[33]、噪声调度和全微调（有和没有EMA目标[56]）与LoRA训练[34]进行了超参数网格搜索，并从所有运行和训练过程中选择最佳检查点。对于LADD，我们只训练一次并选择最后一个检查点。如图6所示，LADD以较大优势优于LCM。

items.en: As discussed in Section 2, Consistency Distillation may require heavy hyperparameter tuning. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first work that attempting LCM training on Diffusion Transformers [37, 13], and it may be possible that we have not explore the hyperparameter space well enough. We want to highlight that LCM can potentially achieve more impressive results, as shown by SDXL-LCM [34, 33] to which we compare in Section 5.1. We hypothesize that larger models may facilitate LCM training, as evidenced by the substantial improvement when transitioning from SD1.5-LCM to SDXL-LCM [33]. Nonetheless, our experimental findings indicate that LADD can distill both small and large models effectively and without extensive hyperparameter tuning.
items.zh: 如第2节所述，一致性蒸馏可能需要大量的超参数调整。据我们所知，我们是第一个尝试在扩散Transformer[37, 13]上进行LCM训练的工作，可能我们尚未充分探索超参数空间。我们想强调，LCM可能取得更令人印象深刻的结果，如SDXL-LCM[34, 33]所示，我们在第5.1节中进行了比较。我们假设更大的模型可能有助于LCM训练，从SD1.5-LCM过渡到SDXL-LCM[33]时的显著改进证明了这一点。尽管如此，我们的实验结果表明，LADD可以有效地蒸馏小型和大型模型，且无需大量超参数调整。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Comparing latent distillation approaches. We distill an MMDiT (depth=24) with both LCM and LADD. For LADD, we use the same model as a teacher and data generator. We find that LADD consistently outperforms LCM in a single step.
items.capZh: 图6：比较潜蒸馏方法。我们用LCM和LADD蒸馏了一个MMDiT（深度=24）。对于LADD，我们使用相同的模型作为教师和数据生成器。我们发现LADD在单步中始终优于LCM。

items.en: We consider three dimension for scaling model size: student, teacher, and data generator. For the following experiments, we keep two dimensions constant at the default setting (depth=24), allowing variation in just one. We utilize the models of the scaling study evaluated in [13].
items.zh: 我们考虑三个维度来缩放模型大小：学生、教师和数据生成器。在以下实验中，我们将两个维度保持在默认设置（深度=24），仅允许一个维度变化。我们使用了[13]中评估的缩放研究中的模型。

items.en: Fig. 7 presents the results. Student model size significantly impacts performance, surpassing both data quality and teacher model size in influence. Consequently, larger student models do not only demonstrate superior performance as diffusion models [13], but that performance advantage is effectively transferred to their distilled versions. While teacher models and data quality contribute to improvements, their benefits plateau, indicating diminishing returns beyond certain thresholds. This pattern suggests a strategy for optimizing resource allocation, especially under memory constraints, by prioritizing larger student models while allowing for smaller teacher models without substantially compromising performance.
items.zh: 图7展示了结果。学生模型大小显著影响性能，超过数据质量和教师模型大小的影响。因此，较大的学生模型不仅作为扩散模型表现出更优的性能[13]，而且这种性能优势有效地转移到其蒸馏版本中。虽然教师模型和数据质量有助于改进，但它们的收益趋于平稳，表明超过一定阈值后收益递减。这种模式提示了一种优化资源分配的策略，特别是在内存限制下，优先考虑更大的学生模型，同时允许使用较小的教师模型而不会显著损害性能。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Scaling behaviour. We ablate the size of student, teacher, and data generator model. Our default setting is a depth of 24 for all models and we vary one dimension at a time. A tangible difference is particularly noticeable when varying student depth. We show samples for a fixed seed and the following prompts: “a cat patting a crystal ball with the number 7 written on it in black marker", “an astronaut riding a horse in a photorealistic style", and “a dog wearing a baseball cap backwards and writing BONEZ on a chalkboard" (left, top to bottom).
items.capZh: 图7：缩放行为。我们消融了学生、教师和数据生成模型的规模。默认设置是所有模型的深度为24，每次只改变一个维度。当改变学生深度时，差异尤为明显。我们展示了固定种子和以下提示的样本：“一只猫拍打一个水晶球，球上用黑色记号笔写着数字7”、“一个宇航员以逼真风格骑马”、“一只狗反戴棒球帽，在黑板上写‘BONEZ’”（左侧，从上到下）。

items.en: For better human preference alignment, we finetune our models via Diffusion DPO ([61]), an adaption of the Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) [40] technique to diffusion models. In particular, we introduce learnable Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) matrices (of rank 256) for all linear layers into the teacher model and finetune it for 3k iterations with the DPO objective. For the subsequent LADD training, we use the DPO-finetuned model for student, teacher, and data generation. Interestingly, we find that we can further improve our LADD-student model by reapplying the original DPO-LoRA matrices. The resulting model achieves a win rate of 56% in a human preference study against the initial, non-DPO LADD-student evaluated at a single step. The human preference study follows the procedures outlined in Section A. DPO is even more impactful in the multi-step setting, as shown in the qualitative examples in Fig. 8.
items.zh: 为了更好的人类偏好对齐，我们通过扩散DPO（[61]）微调模型，这是直接偏好优化（DPO）[40]技术对扩散模型的改编。具体来说，我们在教师模型中为所有线性层引入可学习的低秩适配（LoRA）矩阵（秩为256），并使用DPO目标微调3000次迭代。在后续的LADD训练中，我们对学生、教师和数据生成使用DPO微调后的模型。有趣的是，我们发现通过重新应用原始的DPO-LoRA矩阵，可以进一步改进我们的LADD学生模型。在单步评估中，得到的模型在人类偏好研究中相对于初始的非DPO LADD学生取得了56%的胜率。人类偏好研究遵循A节概述的程序。DPO在多步设置中影响更大，如图8中的定性示例所示。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Applying DPO to LADD students. Samples are generated by our best 8B model at 4 steps. After LADD training, we apply pretrained DPO-LoRA matrices to our student, which adds more details, fixes duplicates objects (e.g. car wheels), improves hands, and increases overall visual appeal (bottom).
items.capZh: 图8：将DPO应用于LADD学生。样本由我们最好的8B模型在4步下生成。在LADD训练后，我们将预训练的DPO-LoRA矩阵应用于学生，这增加了更多细节，修复了重复对象（例如车轮），改进了手部，并提高了整体视觉吸引力（底部）。

items.en: Our evaluations begin with the text-to-image synthesis setting. We then progress to image-to-image tasks, demonstrating the universal applicability of our distillation approach. We adopt a training strategy that incorporates both full and partial noise inputs to enable multi-step inference. For multi-step inference we employ a flow consistency sampler.
items.zh: 我们的评估从文本到图像合成设置开始。然后我们进展到图像到图像任务，展示了我们蒸馏方法的普遍适用性。我们采用了一种结合完整和部分噪声输入的训练策略，以实现多步推理。对于多步推理，我们使用流一致性采样器。

items.en: We train across four discrete timesteps t∈[1,0.75,0.5,0.25]𝑡10.750.50.25t\in[1,0.75,0.5,0.25]. For two- and four-step inference, we found the consistency sampler proposed in [58] to work well. For two step inference, we evaluate the model at t∈[1,0.5]𝑡10.5t\in[1,0.5]. At higher resolutions (>5122absentsuperscript5122>512^{2} pixels), an initial warm-up phase is crucial for training stability; thus, we start with lower noise levels (initial probability distribution p=[0,0,0.5,0.5]𝑝000.50.5p=[0,0,0.5,0.5]). After 500 iterations, the focus shifts towards full noise (p=[0.7,0.1,0.1,0.1]𝑝0.70.10.10.1p=[0.7,0.1,0.1,0.1]) to refine single-shot performance. Lastly, MAR training follows the binning strategy outlined in [38, 13].
items.zh: 我们在四个离散时间步t∈[1,0.75,0.5,0.25]上训练。对于两步和四步推理，我们发现[58]中提出的一致性采样器效果良好。对于两步推理，我们在t∈[1,0.5]上评估模型。在更高分辨率（>512²像素）下，初始预热阶段对训练稳定性至关重要；因此，我们从较低的噪声水平开始（初始概率分布p=[0,0,0.5,0.5]）。经过500次迭代后，重点转向完全噪声（p=[0.7,0.1,0.1,0.1]）以优化单步性能。最后，MAR训练遵循[38,13]中概述的分箱策略。

items.en: For our main comparison to other approaches, we conduct user preference studies, assessing image quality and prompt alignment, see Section A for details. Fig. 9 presents the results in the single step setting. SD3-Turbo clearly outperforms all baselines in both image quality and prompt alignment. Taking four steps instead of one significantly improves results further which we also illustrate in Fig. 11. We also evaluate SD3-Turbo at four steps against various state-of-the-art text-to-image models in Fig. 10. SD3-Turbo reaches the same image quality as its teacher model SD3, but in four instead of 50 steps. Although there is a slight reduction in prompt alignment relative to SD3, SD3-Turbo still beats strong baselines like Midjourney v6. We provide high-resolution, multi-aspect samples from SD3-Turbo in Fig. 1 and Fig. 2.
items.zh: 为了与其他方法进行主要比较，我们进行了用户偏好研究，评估图像质量和提示对齐，详见A节。图9展示了单步设置下的结果。SD3-Turbo在图像质量和提示对齐方面明显优于所有基线。采用四步而非一步显著进一步改善了结果，我们也在图11中进行了说明。我们还在图10中将SD3-Turbo在四步下与各种最先进的文本到图像模型进行了比较。SD3-Turbo在四步内达到了与其教师模型SD3相同的图像质量，而不是50步。尽管相对于SD3，提示对齐略有降低，但SD3-Turbo仍然击败了像Midjourney v6这样的强基线。我们在图1和图2中提供了SD3-Turbo的高分辨率、多宽高比样本。

items.capEn: Figure 9: User preference study (single step). We compare the performance of our model against established baselines. Our model clearly outperforms all other baselines in human preference for both image quality and prompt alignment. Using more sampling steps further improves our model’s results (bottom row).
items.capZh: 图9：用户偏好研究（单步）。我们将模型的性能与已建立的基线进行比较。我们的模型在人类偏好中在图像质量和提示对齐方面明显优于所有其他基线。使用更多采样步骤进一步改善了模型的结果（底行）。

items.capEn: Figure 10: User preference study (multiple steps). We compare SD3-Turbo 10242superscript102421024^{2}-MAR to SOTA text-to-image generators. Our model, using four sampling steps, outperforms or is on par with all evaluated systems. We use default settings for all other multi-step samplers and four steps for SDXL-Turbo. For the SDXL-Turbo comparison, we downsample the SD3-Turbo outputs to 5122superscript5122512^{2} pixels.
items.capZh: 图10：用户偏好研究（多步）。我们将SD3-Turbo 1024²-MAR与SOTA文本到图像生成器进行比较。我们的模型使用四个采样步骤，优于或与所有评估系统持平。我们对所有其他多步采样器使用默认设置，对SDXL-Turbo使用四步。对于SDXL-Turbo比较，我们将SD3-Turbo输出下采样到512²像素。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Qualitative effect of sampling steps. We show qualitative examples when sampling SD3-Turbo with 1 and 4 steps; seeds are constant within columns. †: We only show the first sentence of the prompt to save space. The remainder is as follows: The painting depicts a tranquil river between mountains. a ship gently bobbing in the water and entering the living room. The river’s edge spills onto the wooden floor, merging the world of art with reality. The living room is adorned with tasteful furniture and a warm, inviting atmosphere., cinematic, photo, poster..
items.capZh: 图11：采样步骤的定性效果。我们展示了使用1步和4步采样SD3-Turbo的定性示例；列内种子固定。†：为节省空间，我们只显示提示的第一句。其余部分如下：这幅画描绘了山间一条宁静的河流。一艘船轻轻在水中摇晃，驶入客厅。河岸溢出到木地板上，将艺术世界与现实融合。客厅装饰着品味家具，氛围温暖宜人。，电影感，照片，海报。

items.en: It is straightforward to apply LADD to tasks other than text-to-image synthesis. To validate this claim, we apply LADD to instruction-guided image editing and image inpainting. We first continue training the pretrained text-to-image diffusion model with the diffusion objective and the dataset adjusted for the respective task. We refer to these models as SD3-edit (depth=24) and SD3-inpainting (depth=18) respectively. We then apply LADD as described in Sec. 3 to distill the image-to-image models, resulting in SD3-edit Turbo and SD3-inpainting Turbo.
items.zh: 将LADD应用于文本到图像合成以外的任务很简单。为了验证这一说法，我们将LADD应用于指令引导的图像编辑和图像修复。我们首先使用扩散目标和针对相应任务调整的数据集继续训练预训练的文本到图像扩散模型。我们将这些模型分别称为SD3-edit（深度=24）和SD3-inpainting（深度=18）。然后，我们按照第3节所述应用LADD来蒸馏图像到图像模型，得到SD3-edit Turbo和SD3-inpainting Turbo。

items.en: Image Editing For the image editing task we consider instruction-based editing [7]. Following [7, 52], we condition on the input image via channel-wise concatenation and train on paired data with edit instructions. We use the synthetic InstrucPix2Pix dataset, for which we follow [6] and upsample the original 5122superscript5122512^{2} pixel samples using SDXL [38]. Similar to [52] we use additional data from bidirectional controlnet tasks (canny edges, keypoints, semantic segmentation, depth maps, HED lines) as well as object segmentation. During sampling, we guide the edit model with a nested classifier-free guidance formulation [17, 7], which allows us to utilize different strengths w𝑤w for the image and text conditioning.
items.zh: 图像编辑 对于图像编辑任务，我们考虑基于指令的编辑[7]。遵循[7,52]，我们通过通道级联对输入图像进行条件化，并在带有编辑指令的配对数据上训练。我们使用合成的InstrucPix2Pix数据集，按照[6]的方法，使用SDXL[38]对原始512²像素样本进行上采样。类似于[52]，我们使用来自双向控制网络任务（Canny边缘、关键点、语义分割、深度图、HED线条）以及对象分割的额外数据。在采样过程中，我们使用嵌套的无分类器引导公式[17,7]引导编辑模型，这允许我们对图像和文本条件化使用不同的强度w。

items.en: Fig. 12 shows the effectiveness of the distilled model especially for style editing tasks and object swaps by integrating the edited object well with the scene. We attribute this improved harmonization capability compared to other approaches to the adversarial loss. In Fig. 13 (Left), we plot the trade-off between CLIP image similarity and CLIP image editing direction similarity [39, 7]. We observe that our student model matches the performance of its teacher in a single step. The notable increase in speed comes at the expense of controllability as the student does not allow to control the trade-off between image and text edit guidance strengths.
items.zh: 图12展示了蒸馏模型的有效性，特别是在风格编辑任务和对象替换方面，通过将编辑对象很好地与场景融合。我们将这种与其他方法相比改进的协调能力归因于对抗性损失。在图13（左）中，我们绘制了CLIP图像相似度与CLIP图像编辑方向相似度[39,7]之间的权衡。我们观察到，我们的学生模型在单步中匹配了其教师的性能。速度的显著提高是以可控性为代价的，因为学生不允许控制图像和文本编辑引导强度之间的权衡。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Qualitative comparison for instruction-based editing. For a given prompt and input image, we compare our distilled SD3-edit Turbo (1 step) to its teacher SD3-edit (50 steps) and several other baselines.
items.capZh: 图12：基于指令的编辑的定性比较。对于给定的提示和输入图像，我们将蒸馏后的SD3-edit Turbo（1步）与其教师SD3-edit（50步）以及其他几个基线进行比较。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Quantitative evaluation on image-to-image tasks. Left: We plot CLIP Image Similarity measuring the fidelity to the input image over CLIP Direction Similarity measuring the fidelity to the edit prompt; higher is better for both metrics. We evaluate over varying image conditioning strengths on the PIE-Bench [23] dataset to compare SD3-edit Turbo and baselines. Right: Quantitative evaluation of image inpainting on COCO [29]; we report FID and LPIPS scores. The masks are created with different policies, ranging from narrow to wide masks and outpainting style masks.
items.capZh: 图13：图像到图像任务的定量评估。左：我们绘制了衡量对输入图像保真度的CLIP图像相似度与衡量对编辑提示保真度的CLIP方向相似度；两个指标都是越高越好。我们在PIE-Bench[23]数据集上评估不同图像条件化强度，以比较SD3-edit Turbo和基线。右：COCO[29]上图像修复的定量评估；我们报告FID和LPIPS分数。掩码使用不同策略创建，从窄掩码到宽掩码和外绘风格掩码。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Qualitative comparison for image inpainting editing. For every masked input image, we compare our distilled SD3-edit inpainting Turbo (1 step) to its teacher SD3-inpainting (50 steps) and other baselines.
items.capZh: 图14：图像修复编辑的定性比较。对于每个掩码输入图像，我们将蒸馏后的SD3-edit inpainting Turbo（1步）与其教师SD3-inpainting（50步）以及其他基线进行比较。

items.en: Image Inpainting For image inpainting, we condition on the masked input image for which we employ different masking strategies, ranging from narrow strokes, round cutouts and rectangular cutouts to outpainting masks. Furthermore, we always condition on the input image during training and inference, only omitting the text conditioning for the unconditional case. This configuration differs from that used in the editing task, where we employ the nested classifier-free guidance formulation. For distillation, we use the same LADD hyperparameters as for the editing model. Since we do not employ synthetic data for this task, we use an additional distillation loss to improve text-alignment. Our baselines are LaMa [59] and SD1.5-inpainting 222https://huggingface.co/runwayml/stable-diffusion-inpainting. We sample LaMa and SD1.5-inpainting with the corresponding binary mask. SD3-inpainting is sampled for 50 steps with guidance strength 4, SD1.5 is sampled with the proposed default parameters, i.e., 50 steps, guidance scale 7.5.
items.zh: 图像修复 对于图像修复，我们对掩码输入图像进行条件化，为此我们采用不同的掩码策略，从窄笔画、圆形裁剪和矩形裁剪到外绘掩码。此外，我们在训练和推理期间始终对输入图像进行条件化，仅在无条件情况下省略文本条件化。此配置与编辑任务中使用的配置不同，在编辑任务中我们采用嵌套的无分类器引导公式。对于蒸馏，我们使用与编辑模型相同的LADD超参数。由于我们对此任务不使用合成数据，因此我们使用额外的蒸馏损失来改善文本对齐。我们的基线是LaMa[59]和SD1.5-inpainting（https://huggingface.co/runwayml/stable-diffusion-inpainting）。我们使用相应的二值掩码对LaMa和SD1.5-inpainting进行采样。SD3-inpainting以引导强度4采样50步，SD1.5使用建议的默认参数采样，即50步，引导尺度7.5。

items.en: Fig. 14 and Fig. 13 (Right) present qualitative and quantitative evaluations of the baselines and our model. Again, our distilled model performs on par with its teacher in a single step. LaMa beats all models on LPIPS, yet the high FID and qualitative comparisons show that LaMa lacks behind when large, non-homogeneous areas are masked.
items.zh: 图14和图13（右）展示了基线和我们模型的定性和定量评估。再次，我们的蒸馏模型在单步中与其教师表现相当。LaMa在LPIPS上击败了所有模型，但高FID和定性比较表明，当大面积非均匀区域被掩码时，LaMa落后。

items.en: In the human preference study detailed in Section 5.1, we demonstrate that while SD3 Turbo maintains the teacher’s image quality within just four steps, it does so at the expense of prompt alignment. This trade-off introduces common text-to-image synthesis challenges such as object duplication and merging, fine-grained spatial prompting, and difficulties with negation. These issues, while not unique to our model, underscore a fundamental trade-off between model capacity, prompt alignment, and inference speed; exploring and quantifying this trade-off constitutes an exciting future research direction.
items.zh: 在5.1节详述的人类偏好研究中，我们证明虽然SD3 Turbo在仅四步内保持了教师的图像质量，但这是以提示对齐为代价的。这种权衡引入了常见的文本到图像合成挑战，如对象重复和合并、细粒度空间提示以及否定困难。这些问题虽然并非我们的模型独有，但强调了模型容量、提示对齐和推理速度之间的基本权衡；探索和量化这种权衡构成了一个令人兴奋的未来研究方向。

items.en: In our evaluation of image editing capabilities, we observe a lack of control due to the absence of adjustable image and text guidance strengths found in comparative methods [7]. A potential solution is deliberately adjusting these parameters during the training phase, coupled with model conditioning on these parameters as proposed in [33]. Lastly, ins some cases the model exhibits rigidity, i.e., it adheres too closely to the input, rendering large changes challenging.
items.zh: 在我们对图像编辑能力的评估中，我们观察到由于缺乏可调节的图像和文本引导强度（如比较方法[7]中所示），导致可控性不足。一个潜在的解决方案是在训练阶段有意调整这些参数，并结合模型对这些参数的条件化，如[33]所提出的。最后，在某些情况下，模型表现出刚性，即过于贴近输入，使得大的改变具有挑战性。

items.capEn: Figure 15: Failure cases. While SD3-Turbo retains the image quality of its teacher, prompt alignment can suffer. Notably, we observe issues such as the merging of distinct entities, diminished accuracy in detailed spatial descriptions, and overlooked negations in prompts, though not universally across different random seeds.
items.capZh: 图15：失败案例。虽然SD3-Turbo保留了其教师的图像质量，但提示对齐可能受到影响。值得注意的是，我们观察到诸如不同实体的合并、详细空间描述的准确性降低以及提示中否定的忽略等问题，尽管并非在所有随机种子下都普遍存在。
